OmniScript.description: This is the omni script launched via the 'Initiate Contracting Request' button on the opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) page.
OmniScript.name: Clinician

childElements.name: AnnualSubsidyifapplicable
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Annual Subsidy - if applicable", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: CurrentCliniciansunderNonCompete
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Current Clinicians under Non-Compete?", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: FinancialArrangement
GovernanceProvisions
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Governance Provisions", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Quarterly Governance Meetings (full transparency, standard process) + Regular Operating Reviews", "value" : "Quarterly Governance Meetings (full transparency, standard process) + Regular Operating Reviews", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Quarterly Business Reviews + Regular Operating Reviews", "value" : "Quarterly Business Reviews + Regular Operating Reviews", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Routine Operating Reviews Only", "value" : "Routine Operating Reviews Only", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IfYesaretermsreflectedintheProforma
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : null, "label" : "Checkbox2", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "If Yes, are terms reflected in the Proforma?", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "VolumeProtector" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IfYesforhowlong
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "If Yes, for how long?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "StartupCosts" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: IfyeswhatisSCPcontribution
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "If yes, what is SCP’s contribution?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "CurrentCliniciansunderNonCompete" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: LeasedProviders
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Leased Providers", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LineBreak3
LineBreak6
LineBreak7
LineBreak8
MaterialChangeLanguage
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Checkbox2", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Material Change Language", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: MaximumAmountHospitalwillContribute
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Maximum Amount Hospital will Contribute?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "StartupCosts" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: multipleprograms
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "If there are multiple programs, is there any cross subsidization?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No", "value" : "No", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "N/A", "value" : "N/A", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: OtherLeasedPersonnel
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Other Leased Personnel", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: OtherLeasedPersonnelDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Other Leased Personnel Description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "OtherLeasedPersonnel" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: Providedescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Provide description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Other", "condition" : "=", "field" : "FinancialArrangement" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: StartupCosts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Checkbox3", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Start-up Costs", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: VolumeProtector
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Checkbox1", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Volume Protector", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: FinancialInformation
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Financial Information", "collapse" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false }

childElements.name: ContractType
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Contract Type", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : "image", "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Outsourced", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Outsourced" }, { "name" : "Performance Edge", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Performance Edge" }, { "name" : "Other", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Other (Provide Description Below)" } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "image", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ExpectedStartDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Expected Start Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: InitialTermYears
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Initial Term (Years)", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "^([0-9]|[1-9][0-9])$", "ptrnErrText" : "The number of years must be less than or equal to 99", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: LineBreak1
LineBreak2
RequestType
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Request Type", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Initial Request", "value" : "Initial Request", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Revised Request", "value" : "Revised Request", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SelectPackage
ServiceTypeOtherDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Service Type Other Description", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "OR", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Other", "condition" : "=", "field" : "ContractType" }, { "field" : "ContractType", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Performance Edge;Other" }, { "field" : "ContractType", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Outsourced;Other" }, { "field" : "ContractType", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Outsourced;Performance Edge;Other" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "General Information", "collapse" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false }

childElements.name: Ifnonstandardprovidedetailsbelow
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If non-standard, provide details below", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "false", "condition" : "=", "field" : "StandardMalpracticeLimits" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Malpractice Insurance Provided By", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Client", "value" : "Client", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "SCP Health", "value" : "SCP Health", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: amountatrisk
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "If Yes, amount at risk: $ or % (At risk money may not exceed amount of Subsidy)", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 50, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "KPIAtRiskMoney" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "If agreed upon, please provide details below", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Agreed Upon", "condition" : "=", "field" : "PerformanceQualityMetricsSelectOne" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_InitiateContractingRequest", "integrationProcedureKey" : "InitiateContractingRequest_Clinician", "useContinuation" : false, "PerformaStatusOfOpportunity", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Model Confirmed" } ] } }, { "field" : "selectContractTypeRequest", "condition" : "<>", "data" : "Client Agreement Request" } ] } },
